items.title: PHOTO: Indiana Fever's Caitlin Clark featured on NBA 2K27 cover
items.summary: Caitlin Clark is the first WNBA player to be featured on a global NBA 2K cover.NBA 2K27 announced today that Clark, Victor Wembanyama abd Derrick Rose will be featured on covers of the editions, which will be will released Sept. 4. Clark will be on the deluxe cover.She’s obsessed with the work Caitlin Clark is your NBA 2K27 Deluxe Edition Cover AthletePre-order NBA 2K27 now! ➡️ https://t.co/J6pi6mirRHpic.twitter.com/Fk1UG0aLcl— NBA 2K (@NBA2K) July 22, 2026"Being on the cover of NBA 2K27 is special because this game reaches fans all over the world,” Clark said. “To be the first WNBA player on her own global cover means women's basketball gets to show up on that stage too, and I am proud to be part of that."Clark joins a handful of WNBA legends who have made NBA 2K cover appearances, including Candance Parker (2022), Diana Taurasi (2023), Sue Bird (2023), Sabrina Ionescu…

items.title: Caitlin Clark scores historic NBA 2K27 Deluxe Edition cover honor
items.summary: Caitlin Clark is officially an NBA 2K27 cover athlete.On Wednesday, NBA 2K announced the specially selected cover athletes for NBA 2K27. NBA star Victor Wembanyama will be on the cover of the Standard Edition, and Chicago Bulls legend Derrick Rose will be on the limited-time Ultra Edition. Clark, who is set to grace the cover of the Deluxe Edition, is the first WNBA player featured on her own global NBA 2K premium cover."Being on the cover of NBA 2K27 is special because this game reaches fans all over the world,” said Clark via release. “To be the first WNBA player on her own global cover means women's basketball gets to show up on that stage too, and I am proud to be part of that."She’s obsessed with the work 💭🏀Caitlin Clark is your NBA 2K27 Deluxe Edition Cover AthletePre-order NBA 2K27 now! ➡️ https://t.co/3HbX2GhFQ5pic.twitter.com/JTeXXVpEkw— WNBA (@WNBA) July 22,…

items.title: NBA Power Rankings: How does the East stack up after major offseason moves?
items.summary: There has been a lot of player movement this offseason in the NBA, and outside of LaMelo Ball going to the Minnesota Timberwolves, most of the action has moved to the Eastern Conference.So, we figured we'd take a stab at power ranking our new East. These rankings are, of course, perfect and inarguable. They're certainly not just one man's opinion in the dog days of summer, before anyone has played a game, which could make it impossible to power rank a conference.But we here at Yahoo Sports are up to the task of the seemingly impossible. We can certainly project what could happen — if everyone were healthy, if LeBron James chooses a certain (hometown) team.So, here is one way the regular season could unfold in the East, where a good team will get squeezed from the play-in tournament, and really good teams are not guaranteed a playoff spot.(We reserve the right to change our…

Add us as a preferred source on your Google account here.Kalshi users have traded more than $197 million trying to predict where free-agent superstar LeBron James will land - and that number is only climbing.Key TakeawaysThe Warriors are now a long shot after surging to a 46% chance when free agency began.Reports suggest James still has not made his decision.The Heat accidentally scheduled a press conference for James on their YouTube channel, leading to a big probability swing.Kalshi’s market data on Tuesday showed the Cleveland Cavaliers were a 38% favorite to attract James for a third stint in his hometown. That was slightly ahead of the Miami Heat (36%), whom James opted for when he left Cleveland for the first time in 2010 and with whom he eventually won two championships.The market shifted dramatically when online sleuths noticed the Heat had…

items.title: Victor Wembanyama, Derrick Rose revealed as NBA 2K27 cover athletes
items.summary: San Antonio Spurs superstar Victor Wembanyama was named the NBA 2K27 Standard Edition cover athlete.The game's Ultra Edition cover will feature former NBA player Derrick Rose, and the Deluxe Edition will have Indiana Fever guard Caitlin Clark gracing the cover. The three cover athletes have each been the No. 1 overall pick in their drafts and went on to win the Rookie of the Year award in their respective leagues.Wembanyama is coming off a season in which he averaged 25 points, 11.5 rebounds, and 3.1 blocks per game. He was named the NBA Defensive Player of the Year and a first-team All-NBA selection, helping the Spurs reach the NBA Finals, which they lost in five games to the New York Knicks.We are not alone 👽 Victor Wembanyama has landed as your NBA 2K27 Standard Edition Cover AthletePre-order NBA 2K27 now! ➡️ https://t.co/wflnyoAd5Rpic.twitter.com/Xww8BE9uLK— NBA 2K (@NBA2K)…

items.title: Miami Heat say leaked link to LeBron James introductory press conference just a mistake
items.summary: Did someone with the Miami Heat leak LeBron James' decision before he did? The Heat deny it, but in a vacuum of information about where LeBron will play next season and when it will be announced, it took on a life of its own.Someone with the Heat posted a link to a YouTube stream titled "LeBron James Introductory Press Conference | July 27, 2026" and that quickly took off on social media.The Miami Heat’s official YouTube channel had LeBron’s introductory press conference scheduled for July 27 (h/t @WadexFlash / https://t.co/ngYXKtG4ps) pic.twitter.com/OCNZMkiiVO— NBACentral (@TheDunkCentral) July 22, 2026The Heat instantly denied it, telling the Miami Herald and ESPN’s Shams Charania that this was simply Miami's social media team preparing for the possibility of LeBron choosing the Heat and they accidentally put the link live for a minute. The Heat deny it has any…

items.title: Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton marries longtime partner Jade Jones
items.summary: Indiana Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton shared on social media that he has officially tied the knot with his longtime partner, Jade Jones, earlier this week.The couple announced on Instagram that they are now "courthouse official," having exchanged vows at an Indianapolis courthouse surrounded by close friends and family. The couple has shared plans to celebrate with a larger wedding ceremony on Aug. 1..oembed-frame {width:100%;height:100%;margin:0;border:0;}View this post on InstagramA post shared by Jade (@jadeeejones)The couple’s love story started in college in 2019, with Haliburton on the Iowa State basketball team and Jones on the Iowa State cheerleading team. After seven years together, Haliburton proposed on July 28, 2025, at the Hilton Coliseum.Haliburton missed the entire 2025-26 NBA season after suffering a torn Achilles during Game 7 of the 2025 NBA Finals. He has spent the…

items.title: Victor Wembanyama, Caitlin Clark and Derrick Rose announced as NBA 2K27 cover athletes
items.summary: San Antonio Spurs superstar Victor Wembanyama was revealed as the cover athlete for the standard edition of the upcoming NBA 2K27 video game, the company confirmed Wednesday.Wembanyama is the first center to be on the cover of a 2K basketball game since Shaquille O'Neal was on the cover of the Legend Edition of 2K18. Not only is it Wembanyama's first video game cover of his career, but he is also the first Spurs player to appear on the cover since the game's release in 1999.Here's what Wembanyama's cover looks like:We are not alone 👽 Victor Wembanyama has landed as your NBA 2K27 Standard Edition Cover AthletePre-order NBA 2K27 now! ➡️ https://t.co/wflnyoAd5Rpic.twitter.com/Xww8BE9uLK— NBA 2K (@NBA2K) July 22, 2026The decision to put Wembanyama on the game’s cover has elicited quite the response, particularly from New York Knicks fans, who just watched their team…

items.title: Inside the Suns: Summer League Players Review Edition!
items.summary: Welcome to Inside the Suns, your weekly deep-down analysis of the current Phoenix Suns team. Each week, the Fantable — a round table of Bright Siders — gives their takes on the Suns’ latest issues and news.Fantable Questions of the WeekThis week there was one basic question, “What is your evaluation of __’s performance in Summer League?” which was asked about 4 players, Maluach, Fleming, Peat, and Brea.Q1: Khaman MaluachGuarGuar: I was absolutely blown away by the performance Khaman put on this summer. He was absolutely a dominant force on both ends and he’s given me so much hope for this upcoming season. His defense and rebounding were elite, and his offensive game looked way more polished. The 3 point shot looked very legit. He shot a small sample size obviously but the form looked very solid and promising. He looked too good for summer league and that’s exactly what you want to see…
